name: 14oz Stoneware Embossed Paw Cat Parent Mug Ivory - Room Essentials™
description:
Add some feline vibes to your day by sipping your favorite beverage from the 14-Ounce Stoneware Embossed Paw Cat Parent Mug from Room Essentials™. This dotted, ivory mug features an embossed paw design on the front and "Cat Parent" written inside. Suitable for sipping both hot and cold beverages, this stoneware mug is also dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
